blended.narrative: Pico Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
